warning.willBeAllocatedToConsolidatedInvoice: The added memorandum will be allocated to the consolidated invoice <0>#{{documentNumber}}</0>.
warning.willNotBeAllocatedInvoice: Memorandums cannot be allocated to the paid invoice. The memorandum will be created as unallocated.
warning.willNotBeAllocatedPayment: Memorandums cannot be allocated to the paid or disputed payment. The memorandum will be created as unallocated.

associated.info: Memorandums associated with the current {{type}}. These memorandums don't affect the {{type}} amount, but are merely displayed to show their origin.
